ops.text: Phase 3 sweep RESULT (wf_1004d416-7cd, 41 lanes, 100 min): 32 shipped green incl. all 5 cc-present enablement riders. Attention triage: captain-hook + cc-vigil + cc-interact retirements LANDED (check-backs were about orthogonal CI reds); synckit + cc-present found the work already landed with our message (likely intra-workflow retry ghosts — end state disk-verified by the lanes); cc-interact's red = fleet drift class: CI steps invoking the v11-removed `pack lint` (deterministic fleet scan says cc-interact is the ONLY live instance; cc-notes' hits die with its lane; captain-hook root-checkout hits were a stale detached copy — main's ci.yml verified on builtin_packs already). captain-hook main RED from the concurrent session's b65dfe88 (test_pack_deletions imports rm_targets, renamed by their fluent-evt.cmd rm-guard rewrite) — fix-forward lane dispatched per stewardship. cc-vigil red = PRE-EXISTING stale cc-transcript SPM pin (e04b44cd force-pushed away, failing since 07-18) — owner decision, task #11, report-only. Six remediation lanes now in flight: ccnotes-lane (combined pack move + config retire + ci.yml, unblocked by their 77d45900 landing), ccpool-lane (foreign lock re-render absorb), cctranscript-lane + writelikeme-lane (temp-clone strategy — local copies are parked concurrent sessions), ccinteract-ci-fix (delete-or-retarget the pack-smoke job), ch-red-fix (test import alignment). After these: zero-ref GitHub probe → closing lane (cc-skills shared fragments + repo-bootstrap templates, task #10) → Phase 4.
